arts.ttl: Milan take new approach for Walker and Manchester City
arts.sum: According to Sky Sport Italia, Milan can sign Kyle Walker on loan with an option...

arts.ttl: Milan Move Closer to Signing Kyle Walker from Manchester City
arts.sum: AC Milan are making significant strides in their pursuit of Kyle Walker, the experienced right-back currently playing for Manchester City. The Rossoneri have reportedly reached an agreement with Walker on personal terms and are now in the process of finalizing details with City. The post Milan Move Closer to Signing Kyle Walker from Manchester City appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Erling Haaland and Cristiano Ronaldo dominate the market with their impressive new contracts
arts.sum: However, there are others that can, such as Manchester City and Al Nassr with Erling Haaland and Cristiano Ronaldo, who on Friday became the highest-paid soccer players on the planet Both players will extend their ties with their respective teams, so we make a comparison of what they will earn in the coming years .

arts.ttl: The key factors behind Pep Guardiola’s seperation with wife Serra
arts.sum: The breakup has received limited media coverage and neither the Manchester City coach nor the businesswoman have offered any interviews relating to their personal lives. Catalan daily ‘ El Periódico de Catalunya ’ recently offered insight via journalists, Laura Fa and Lorena Vázquez as to why Pep Guardiola and Cristina Serra have finally gone their separate ways.

arts.ttl: Man City splash the cash: Haaland & Marmoush to be paid a FORTUNE
arts.sum: Manchester City are set to pay almost €1 million per week in wages just for their two strikers after extending Erling Haaland's contract and striking a deal for Omar Marmoush . Amid all of these negotiations over incomings, Man City finalised Erling Haaland's historic new contract, which is thought to be one of the most lucrative in football history and which ties him to the club until 2034.

arts.ttl: Revealed: The total package Erling Haaland will net from mega new Man City deal as star becomes HIGHEST-PAID footballer on the planet
arts.sum: EXCLUSIVE BY MIKE KEEGAN: Erling Haaland's gigantic, nine-and-a-half-year contract is the most lucrative handed to a player in the history of football.

arts.ttl: Fabrizio Romano Transfer News: Chelsea swap LATEST, Zirkzee Man Utd TRUTH, ANOTHER Man City deal
arts.sum: Fabrizio Romano has provided some massive updates on the biggest transfer stories from around Europe, including the latest on Christopher Nkunku's potential Chelsea departure, the truth behind the rumours of Man Utd axing Joshua Zirkzee and Man City's pursuit of their fourth January signing. Romano then provided an update on Alphonso Davies' contract talks with Bayern Munich and revealed that he is only Real Madrid's plan B.

arts.ttl: Eintracht boss confirms Marmoush's imminent move to Manchester City
arts.sum: Speaking ahead of Eintracht Frankfurt's match against Borussia Dortmund on Friday, Markus Krösche confirmed reports that Omar Marmoush is set to join Manchester City.

arts.ttl: Man United legend Denis Law dies aged 84
arts.sum: Manchester United legend Denis Law has died at age 84, his family confirmed in a statement on Friday.

arts.ttl: Haaland's 2034 deal proves he trusts Man City - Guardiola
arts.sum: Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola says Erling Haaland signed a new contract at the Etihad because he has faith in the club.
